messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The verbosity the human negotiated should govern the messages he actually reads — the front desk's replies
What it solves: WHY THIS IS A SEPARATE TICKET FROM BL-382. BL-382 puts `verbosity` in the contract and feeds it
to the AGENTS' generated prompts — genuinely useful, but the agents' internal chatter is not what
the human reads. The messages he actually reads are the front desk's replies to him on Telegram.
That is …
How it works: The front desk answers at the agreed level
